classification: Remotion License (repository scope; package manifest omits license field)
classificationBasis: The published package identifies the Remotion monorepo package path and version, while the exact v4.0.489 repository root supplies the Remotion License. This is an engineering inventory classification, not legal advice.
binaryNotice: The package includes the Remotion compositor, FFmpeg executables, and linked media libraries. Repository-license classification does not replace packaging-time collection of all binary notices, linked-library licences, codec obligations, or patent review.
